name: agentic-knowledge-kit
description: Reusable Codex/agent skill and installer for adding a project knowledge layer to a git repository.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/semantic-vector-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/build-semantic-vector-index.mjs && node --check scripts/query-semantic-vector-index.mjs && node --check scripts/agentic-knowledge-context.mjs && node --check scripts/test-semantic-vector-index.mjs && node --check scripts/test-agentic-knowledge-context.mjs
